title: Bedrock Breaker enchantment
description: Adds a powerful enchantment book that allows players to break bedrock legitimately
body:
🧱 BedrockBreaking

BedrockBreaking adds a late-game enchantment that lets players mine, collect, and reuse Bedrock without breaking normal mining balance.

Instead of making everything instant or overpowered, the mod limits the effect strictly to Bedrock and ties progression to clear, vanilla-style advancement.

Built for Fabric servers (including Geyser), this mod turns Bedrock into a meaningful end-game resource rather than a creative-only block.

✨ Features
Bedrock Breaker Enchantment

Can only be applied to Diamond and Netherite Pickaxes

Only affects Bedrock
All other blocks mine at normal vanilla speed

Comes in 4 levels

Enchantment Levels

Level I–III: Gradually faster Bedrock mining

Level IV (admin-only): Instant Bedrock mining

Bedrock Drops

Mined Bedrock drops itself as an item

Placed Bedrock can also be mined again using the enchantment

Crafting & Progression

Craft Level I using Obsidian, a Pickaxe, and a Book

Combine:

2× Level I → Level II

2× Level II → Level III

Level IV cannot be crafted

⚙️ Balance & Design

No global mining speed boosts

No instant mining until Level IV

No anvil abuse or enchant stacking exploits

Progression feels close to vanilla, with clear power scaling

🌐 Server & Geyser Support

Fully server-side

No client mod required

Works seamlessly with Geyser Bedrock players

📦 Requirements

Minecraft 1.21.1

Fabric Loader

Fabric API

Java 21

🛠️ Compatibility

✔ Dedicated servers
✔ Geyser-compatible
✔ Vanilla clients supported

⚠️ Notes

Bedrock becomes renewable only at higher enchantment levels

Level IV is intended for admins, creative mode, or special rewards—not survival progression
